news.headline: Carmit Bachar to headline 13th Annual Ski & Smile Challenge in Park City, Utah by Operation Smile.
news.summary: In Park City, Utah on February 28, 2025, the renowned global nonprofit Operation Smile, which offers cleft surgery and comprehensive care to those in need, is excited to reveal the comeback of its eagerly awaited 13th Annual Operation Smile Ski & Smile Challenge.

news.headline: Spending dips as consumers cut back, but there's a positive sign amidst it all.
"ELS (NYSE: ELS) to attend Citi 2025 Global Property CEO Conference, featuring executive team members."
news.summary: Equity LifeStyle Properties, Inc. (NYSE: ELS) recently disclosed their participation in the upcoming Citi 2025 Global Property CEO Conference. Scheduled for February 28, 2025, in Chicago, key executives from the company, including the President, will be present at the conference. This announcement was made by ELS, a prominent player in the real estate sector, known for their strategic investments and portfolio management. The conference aims to bring together industry leaders and investors to discuss emerging trends and opportunities in the global property market. This participation highlights ELS's commitment to networking and staying abreast of market developments.

news.headline: NJCC donates $50,000 to 5 cities for Black History Month, supporting initiatives for transformative change.
news.summary: Today in New Brunswick, New Jersey, top officials in local communities have selected nonprofit organizations to receive awards from the leading CDFI. These awards are aimed at supporting initiatives that are driving significant change in their respective areas. The awards are set to benefit these nonprofits in executing projects that are making a transformative impact. This initiative is led by New Jersey Community Capital, a prominent national community development financial institution. The recognition was announced on February 28, 2025.

news.headline: Chicago Faucets hosts webinar on plumbing design and waterborne infection risks in buildings on March 12, 2025. Time: 11 AM CST.
news.summary: A company based in Des Plaines, Illinois, Chicago Faucets, is hosting a webinar titled "Plumbing Design: Strategies for Reducing Waterborne Infections in the Modern Era of Water Management" on March 12, 2025, at 11 AM Central Standard Time. The webinar aims to assist industry professionals in understanding and implementing measures to minimize waterborne infections.

news.headline: Russia celebrates Zelenskiy's humiliation in Oval Office.
National Press Club President denounces Vietnam's sentencing of journalist Truong Huy San to 30 months in prison.
news.summary: In a statement today, National Press Club President Mike Balsamo expressed concern over the sentencing of Vietnamese journalist Truong Huy San to 30 months in prison. Balsamo called this act an assault on press freedom, highlighting the importance of journalists being able to speak truthfully.

news.headline: DJ Spinderella joins AHF for Florida AIDS Walk 20th Anniversary at Fort Lauderdale Beach on March 15th.
news.summary: Celebrated hip hop DJ and rapper DJ Spinderella from Salt-N-Pepa fame is set to perform at the upcoming Florida AIDS Walk & Music Festival in Fort Lauderdale. The event, marking AIDS Healthcare Foundation's 20th year celebration, will take place on March 15th at Fort Lauderdale Beach. DJ Spinderella recently opened for Ricky Martin at AHF's World AIDS Day Concert in Miami, drawing significant attention. This annual event by AHF aims to raise awareness and funds to combat AIDS, with a special focus on the Florida region.

news.headline: BlackRock adds Bitcoin fund to portfolios, world's largest asset manager includes ETF in some portfolios.
news.summary: The world's largest asset manager, BlackRock, has decided to include its Bitcoin Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) in a small portion of its Target Allocation portfolios that focus on alternative investments.

news.headline: First Savings Financial Group, Inc. declares $0.16 quarterly dividend per common share to stockholders by March 31, 2025.
news.summary: In Jeffersonville, Indiana on February 28, 2025, First Savings Financial Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: FSFG), the parent company of First Savings Bank, stated that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.16 per common share. This dividend is set to be distributed around March 31, 2025, to shareholders listed on the records as of March 14, 2025.

news.headline: Perma-Pipe International Holdings appoints Jon C. Biro, 58, to Board of Directors effective March 4, 2025. Business leadership experience.
news.summary: Perma-Pipe International Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: PPIH) located in Spring, Texas, shared news about modifications to its Board of Directors. On March 4, 2025, Mr. Jon C. Biro, aged 58, was appointed to the Board, bringing with him vast expertise in business leadership, finance, and executive roles. He currently serves as an Operating Advisor at Snow Peak Capital, LLC since 2022 and holds a board position at Sandy Alexander, Inc., a commercial company within the Snow Peak Capital, LLC portfolio.

news.headline: Saul Centers, Inc. (NYSE: BFS) reports Q4 2024 revenue of $67.9M, up from $66.7M. Full details in the article.
news.summary: In Bethesda, Maryland, on February 28, 2025, Saul Centers, Inc. (NYSE: BFS), a real estate investment trust (REIT), shared its quarterly performance for the period ending on December 31, 2024. The company reported a rise in total revenue to $67.9 million compared to the previous quarter's $66.7 million.

news.headline: Canopy Growth sets up $200 million program for corporate purposes. More in debt, cash, M&A support.
news.summary: Canopy Growth Corporation, a prominent cannabis company, based in Smiths Falls, Ontario, has announced its intention to utilize the net proceeds from an upcoming financial undertaking for various corporate objectives. These objectives include debt repayment, enhancing the company's cash reserves, and facilitating strategic mergers and acquisitions. This decision was unveiled on February 28, 2025. Canopy Growth is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: WEED) and the NASDAQ stock exchange.

BTC reaches $85K due to spot and margin longs, but uncertainty persists over whether the bottom is in or an oversold bounce will trap bulls.
news.summary: The recent movement in Bitcoin's price has left many investors wondering if the cryptocurrency has hit its lowest point or if the current increase is just a temporary rebound that could lead to losses for those who have borrowed too much money in their trading positions. The uncertainty around this issue has led to a lot of speculation, especially considering the significant fluctuations in the market.

news.headline: Trump: Zelenskiy aims to combat
Trump: Zelenskiy has a limited set of cards
'Off the Grid' game's latest update introduces a new cyberlimb and map region, making it the biggest update yet.
news.summary: The latest update for the popular avalanche battle royale shooter Off the Grid includes the addition of a new cyberlimb and expansion of the map with a fresh region. Players can now explore the new area while utilizing the new cyberlimb to enhance their gaming experience. This update is sure to excite fans of the game as they discover all the new content.

news.headline: Trump: Zelenskiy Meeting Not Successful
Guardant Health approved 110,681 RSUs and 22,091 stock options for new employees on February 11, 2025.
news.summary: Guardant Health, Inc., a top precision oncology company based in Palo Alto, California, shared that the Compensation Committee of Guardant’s Board of Directors recently gave the green light for the issuance of awards to new employees. On February 11, 2025, they approved 110,681 restricted stock units (RSUs) which stand for 102 new non-executive employees. Additionally, a non-qualified stock option for 22,091 shares of common stock was granted to another new non-executive employee. Both grants were established on the same date.

news.headline: Fitch affirms United Kingdom at AA-; outlook stable
Fitch affirms Germany at AAA, outlook stable
Byju's executive allegedly concealed cash from lenders, Judge rules. #finance #news
Birks Group Inc. receives notice from NYSE American for non-compliance, stockholders' equity less than $2.0 million.
news.summary: In Montreal, Birks Group Inc. (NYSE American LLC: BGI) has disclosed receiving a notification from the NYSE American LLC on February 25, 2025, citing non-compliance with the ongoing listing criteria outlined in Sections 1003(a)(i) and (ii) of the NYSE American Company Guide. The Company risks invoking Section 1003(a)(i) due to having stockholders’ equity below U.S. $2.0 million and sustaining continuous losses.

news.headline: Vista Gold Corp reported $16.9 million in cash at the end of 2024, showing commitment to long-term success.
news.summary: In Denver today, Vista Gold Corp. (NYSE American and TSX: VGZ) shared its audited financial report for the year ending December 31, 2024. The company disclosed a year-end cash balance of $16.9 million. All financial figures in this statement are in U.S. dollars. Frederick H. Earnest, the President and CEO of Vista, emphasized the accomplishments of 2024 as a testament to their dedication to enhancing shareholder value and setting up Vista and Mt Todd for sustained success.

news.headline: Green Plains Inc. CEO Todd Becker to depart after 17 years effective March 1, 2025. Exec search for new CEO underway.
news.summary: Green Plains Inc. revealed that Todd Becker, the President and CEO, will be leaving the company on March 1, 2025, after over 17 years. As part of the CEO succession strategy, the Board of Directors has enlisted a prominent executive search firm to find a replacement CEO. Additionally, an Executive Committee has been established, with Imre leading the transition process. Green Plains Inc. (NASDAQ: GPRE) shared this news.

news.headline: Kinross reveals ownership stake in Relevant Gold with undisclosed number of shares.
Premier Health reports 2025 Q1 results, filing unaudited financials for quarter ended Dec 31, 2024 (TSXV: PHA).
news.summary: Premier Health of America Inc., a prominent Canadian Healthtech company trading on the TSXV under the symbol PHA, released its unaudited Quarterly Consolidated Financial Statements and MD&A for the first quarter concluding on December 31, 2024, as of February 28, 2025.

news.headline: AirBoss will release Q4 and FY 2024 earnings on March 5, 2025, with a conference call on March 6, 2025, at 9:00 am ET.
news.summary: AirBoss of America Corp., based in Newmarket, Ontario, disclosed that it is set to unveil its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on March 5, 2025. The report will be published post-market closure and will be succeeded by a conference call on March 6, 2025, at 9:00 am Eastern Time. Investors and interested individuals can join the call to delve into the details of the company's performance during the specified period. AirBoss of America Corp. operates under the tickers TSX: BOS and OTCQX: ABSSF.

news.headline: Ranchero Gold Corp. secures Sandspit Gold Project in Canada, with 398.66 hectares of land, a 100% interest option.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on February 28, 2025, Ranchero Gold Corp. disclosed that it has finalized an option agreement with Homegold Resources Ltd. Through this agreement, Ranchero has the opportunity to acquire a full stake in the Sandspit Gold Project, which comprises five mineral claims covering 398.66 hectares near Sandspit, Haida Gwaii, British Columbia. This project is strategically located south of Sandspit and marks a significant development for Ranchero, listed on the TSX.V under the symbol RNCH.

news.headline: Toro Corp plans to split its Handysize tanker business, giving shareholders 1 share in Robin Energy Ltd for every 8 Toro shares.
news.summary: On March 01, 2025, in Limassol, Cyprus, Toro Corp. (NASDAQ: TORO), an international energy transportation services company, announced the decision by its Board of Directors to spin off its Handysize tanker business. The spin-off will include one Handysize tanker and Xavier Shipping Co. (owner of the M/T Wonder Formosa). Toro shareholders will receive one common share of Robin Energy Ltd. for every eight Toro common shares. Robin Energy Ltd. is a newly formed subsidiary that will serve as the holding company for the tanker vessel. The common shares of Robin Energy Ltd. are planned to be listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market. Petros Panagiotidis, Toro's Chairman and CEO, will also serve as Chairman and CEO of Robin Energy Ltd. after the completion of the spin-off.

news.headline: Banco Santander (Brasil) S.A. files Form 20-F with CNPJ/MF: 90.400.888/0001-42, NIRE: 35.300.332.067, on Feb. 28, 2025.
news.summary: Banco Santander (Brasil) S.A., a publicly-held company with Authorized Capital and CNPJ/MF number 90.400.888/0001-42 and NIRE 35.300.332.067, has filed Form 20-F in São Paulo. The submission was made on February 28, 2025. Santander Brasil disclosed its Annual Report through this filing.

news.headline: Keros Therapeutics to participate in healthcare conferences per press release on Feb. 28, 2025 with Jasbir S. Seehra, CEO.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, in Lexington, Keros Therapeutics, Inc. divulged that their Chair and Chief Executive Officer, Jasbir S. Seehra, Ph.D., will engage in healthcare conferences. Keros, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company listed as KROS on Nasdaq, specializes in developing and marketing innovative therapies for patients with disorders linked to defective signaling of the transforming growth factor-beta (“TGF-ß”) protein family.

news.headline: Federated Hermes, Inc. files annual 10-K report with SEC for fiscal year ended Dec. 31, 2024.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, in Pittsburgh, Federated Hermes, Inc. (NYSE: FHI), a renowned player in active investing globally, submitted its Form 10-K annual report for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. This report contains comprehensive information on the company's performance and financial data for the mentioned period. Federated Hermes is dedicated to transparency and thus ensures that all relevant information is accessible to stakeholders.

news.headline: Oak Valley Community Bank hires Jean Turpen as Vice President, Commercial Credit Officer at Roseville Office on Feb 28, 2025.
news.summary: A new addition has been made to Oak Valley Community Bank, a subsidiary of Oak Valley Bancorp (NASDAQ: OVLY), with Jean Turpen taking on the role of Vice President, Commercial Credit Officer. The appointment was confirmed on February 28, 2025, with Turpen being stationed at the Roseville Office situated at 1478 Stone Point Drive in Oakdale, California.

news.headline: Cross Country Healthcare approved acquisition by Aya Healthcare, to be completed in the second half of 2025.
news.summary: Cross Country Healthcare, Inc. (NASDAQ: CCRN) based in Boca Raton, Florida, has received approval from stockholders for its acquisition by Aya Healthcare. The transaction between Cross Country and Aya Healthcare is anticipated to be finalized in the second half of 2025, pending the fulfillment of standard closing conditions outlined in the Merger Agreement.

news.headline: Phoenix Capital Group is now Phoenix Energy, reflecting growth & innovation. Expanded into energy, including mineral rights & operations.
news.summary: On January 27, 2025, in Irvine, California, Phoenix Capital Group Holdings, LLC revealed its new name as Phoenix Energy One, LLC, now known as Phoenix Energy. This shift signifies the company's evolution from a mineral rights acquisition startup to a comprehensive energy enterprise. Phoenix Energy will operate across mineral rights, non-operating working interests, and engaged operations. The rebranding demonstrates the firm's broader focus, technological progress, and dedication to future energy demands.

news.headline: Seeking interest for loan debentures through Finance Innovations. Join us in this opportunity. #Finance #Debentures #Loan
23andMe Special Committee considering strategic alternatives including possible sale of company or assets.
news.summary: On January 28, 2025, in Sunnyvale, California, the Special Committee of the Board of Directors of 23andMe Holding Co. (Nasdaq: ME), a prominent human genetics firm dedicated to enabling individuals to access, comprehend, and leverage the human genome, revealed its initiative to investigate strategic options. These options encompass a potential sale of the company, business merger, asset sale (either wholly or partially), asset licensing, restructuring, or other strategic measures.

news.headline: UXUY's Telegram wallet has 7.8M+ monthly active users & 1.4M+ engaged in Social Trading, becoming the largest in the world.
news.summary: The Telegram wallet (@UXUYbot) of UXUY now has a significant user base, surpassing 7.8 million monthly active users. Among them, 1.4 million users are actively engaged in Social Trading through the platform.

news.headline: Foremost Clean Energy delays Spin-Out closing to January 31, 2025; Shareholders to receive 1 New Foremost Share and 2 Rio Grande Shares per Foremost Share.
news.summary: Foremost Clean Energy Ltd. is spinning out its gold and silver properties into a new company named Rio Grande Resources Ltd. This spin-out is set to occur at 12:01 a.m. on January 31, 2025, one day later than previously announced. Shareholders of Foremost as of January 30, 2025, will receive one new common share of Foremost and two common shares of Rio Grande for each common share of Foremost held. This arrangement aims to separate Foremost's uranium and lithium exploration business from its gold and silver properties, providing shareholders with ownership in both entities.

news.headline: Norsk Hydro issues EUR 500 million green bonds with a 7-year tenor and 3.625% fixed coupon. Successful placement.
news.summary: Norsk Hydro ASA recently completed the issuance of EUR 500 million in senior unsecured green bonds through its Euro Medium Term Note (EMTN) Programme. This newly issued bond has a term of 7 years and features a fixed annual coupon of 3.625 percent (3.649 percent reoffer yield).
